summary: Provision a new Cloud Map private DNS namespace for service discovery. Greenfield today (none exists yet in this estate) — the create stands up the empty namespace, resolvable only inside its VPC; registering services under it is an engineer follow-up.

operations.title: Provision a new private DNS namespace
operations.summary: Request a brand-new Cloud Map private DNS namespace; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up a new aws_service_discovery_private_dns_namespace as a complete specification: its domain name and VPC. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review. Services and instances registered under it are separate follow-up steps.

params.name: namespace_name
params.label: Namespace name
params.help: Domain-shaped namespace, e.g. internal.svc — services register under it as name.internal.svc.

params.name: vpc
params.label: VPC
params.help: The namespace resolves only inside this VPC (and any VPC peered or associated for DNS resolution).

params.name: description
params.label: Description
params.help: Shown in the console next to the namespace's name.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Namespace name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this namespace is for
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this namespace.

decisions: This namespace is resolvable only from inside the chosen VPC (and any VPC peered or DNS-associated with it) — confirm that matches the intended reachability before registering services under it
Services and instances registered under this namespace are engineer follow-ups — this form provisions the empty namespace
